title: Set Up MSW (Mock Service Worker) for API Mocking
summary: Install MSW 2.x, define request handlers, configure browser service worker for development, and wire up Node.js server for Vitest and Jest — intercept and mock HTTP requests without modifying application code.
declaration: I will set up MSW (Mock Service Worker) v2 for API mocking in both browser and Node.js (test) environments. MSW intercepts requests at the network level, so your application code stays unchanged. If you only need browser mocking (no tests), or only test mocking (no browser), say so before I begin.
